title: Consolidated App Invoices view + Invoices tab for inactive plans

posts.author: mattczh (Matthew Chan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello, right now we have to request for support ticket to get invoices for apps without old plans. Furthermore, if we change our plan, the invoices are gone.

Can we have some sort of messy but consolidated view? It is quite hard to match financial statements, even if we manage them yearly without a consolidated view as the transactions do not list the marketplace application name

What are you trying to achieve

The Consolidated view will allow for a quick access & result in time savings of 4 hours a month or more fishing for invoices
